summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary

STEALTH Production is a London-based production company specializing in event production, brand experiences, and content creation, offering services including set design and build, production equipment hire, and on-set support for the photography and filming industry.

Based on the website, they provide end-to-end production support for events, experiential campaigns, and advertising shoots, positioning themselves as a problem-solving partner for the event, photography, and filming industry. Their services range from creating engaging brand experiences to live events, set design and build, and production equipment hire, all aimed at bringing brands to life. They also offer a unique "STEALTH On Set" service — a fully equipped production support vehicle with a Driver/Production Assistant to support crews on set, including gear, wardrobe, and essentials like tea. Their contact details are listed at Unit 2, The Dove Centre, 109 Bartholomew Road, London NW5 2BJ (hello@stealthproduction.co.uk).
